meta.title: Watch the last Delta II rocket ever fly for NASA's ICESAT2!
meta.description:
United Launch Alliance will be launching the ICESat 2 satellite for NASA aboard a Delta 2 rocket from SLC-2W at the Vandenberg Air Force Base. IceSat 2 will be deployed to a low Earth polar orbit at an altitude of 500 KM (310 miles) and at a 92 degree inclination.

The satellite was manufactured by Northrup Grumman Innovation Systems (NGIS). It only has a single instrument, the Advanced Topographic Laser Altimeter System (ATLAS), which was designed and built by the NASA Goddard Space Flight Center who will also be managing the mission.

Read more about it here! - https://everydayastronaut.com/prelaunch-preview-united-launch-alliance-icesat-2/
